stemHtml: When should words be spelt out in radiotelephony?

options.a: Since all words used in radiotelephony are clear, it is needless to spell them out.
options.b: Whenever so requested by the responsible aeronautical reporting and service office.
options.c: Words, names and abbreviations must be spelt out unless exempted to do so.
options.d: Whenever the spelling of proper names, service abbreviations and words is doubtful.
